skills.name: mostlyright-sdk
skills.description: Install and use the Mostly Right Python SDK to pull weather observations, climate reports, numerical model forecasts, and Kalshi settlement pairs for prediction markets.

skills.name: mostlyright-api
skills.description: Call the Mostly Right REST API directly over HTTPS. Covers authentication, endpoint map, response formats (JSON, CSV, parquet, TOON), and the point-in-time snapshot contract.
